attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT /* +parallel(8)*/ 
REPLACE(REPLACE(CONTRACT_NUMBER,CHR(10),' '),CHR(13),' ') AS CONTRACT_NUMBER,
REPLACE(REPLACE(SERVICE_LINE_ID,CHR(10),' '),CHR(13),' ') AS SERVICE_LINE_ID,
REPLACE(REPLACE(BILL_TO_SITE_USE_ID,CHR(10),' '),CHR(13),' ') AS BILL_TO_SITE_USE_ID,
REPLACE(REPLACE(BILLTO_GU_ID,CHR(10),' '),CHR(13),' ') AS BILLTO_GU_ID,
REPLACE(REPLACE(SERVICES_FULL_COVERAGE,CHR(10),' '),CHR(13),' ') AS SERVICES_FULL_COVERAGE,
REPLACE(REPLACE(CXEA_FLAG,CHR(10),' '),CHR(13),' ') AS CXEA_FLAG,
REPLACE(REPLACE(SERVICE_LINE_NAME,CHR(10),' '),CHR(13),' ') AS SERVICE_LINE_NAME
FROM XXCCS_O.XXCCS_DS_SAHDR_CORE
